question: Will Sm metal (Western) spot price exceed 200 USD/kg on May 31, 2026?
reason: Samarium metal prices are significantly below $200/kg, with recent prices around $10/kg.
evidence: As of May 20, 2026, samarium metal prices ranged from $9,583.75 to $9,842.77 per tonne, equating to approximately $9.58 to $9.84 per kilogram. ([www-old.metal.com](https://www-old.metal.com/Rare-Earth-Metals/?utm_source=openai))
On May 19, 2026, samarium metal 99.5% min was priced at $10.44 per kilogram. ([scrapmonster.com](https://www.scrapmonster.com/metal-prices/rare-earth/samarium/953?utm_source=openai))
Samarium oxide 99.9% min was priced at $2.26 per kilogram on May 19, 2026. ([scrapmonster.com](https://www.scrapmonster.com/metal-prices/samarium-oxides-999-min-price/956?utm_source=openai))
